arts.ttl: Juventus, Inter, and Napoli eye Ismajli as Empoli explores free agent market
arts.sum: Ardian Ismajli, the Albanian center-back, has caught the attention of Serie A giants Juventus, Inter, and Napoli as his contract with Empoli nears its end. The 28-year-old defender has reportedly rejected a contract extension offer from Empoli, setting the stage for a potential high-profile move. arts.ttl: Inter v Como for 3 points under the Christmas tree
arts.sum: After losing their first home match against Como in Serie A (1-2 in May 1950), Inter have won each of their subsequent 12 home games against them in the tournament: the Nerazzurri could achieve 13 consecutive home wins against a single opponent for the first time in the top-flight (12 also against Fiorentina, between 2001 and 2013, and Pro Patria, between 1930 and 1955). Inter have won their last seven Serie A matches against Como, only against Pescara (eight) do the Nerazzurri have a longer open streak of consecutive victories in the tournament.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Como: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan gears up to face Como in their upcoming Serie A fixture, manager Simone Inzaghi is set to recall his star players after rotating the squad in Thursday's match. The formidable attacking duo of Marcus Thuram and Lautaro Martinez is expected to lead the line, with Mehdi Taremi and Marko Arnautovic making way.
